requirement_topic.zh: 双频电网支持（50 Hz / 60 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 雙頻電網支援（50 Hz / 60 Hz）

summary.en: Japan operates two distinct grid frequency zones: Eastern Japan (Hokkaido, Tohoku, Kanto, etc.) runs at 50 Hz, while Western Japan (Chubu west, Kinki, Chugoku, Shikoku, Kyushu) runs at 60 Hz. The boundary runs along the Fuji River (富士川) in Shizuoka Prefecture — west of the Fuji River is 60 Hz, east is 50 Hz. Nagano Prefecture is principally 60 Hz, with 10 designated districts (including Iiyama, Komoro, Saku, Matsumoto, Azumino, Omachi) supplied at 50 Hz. A grid-tied PV inverter must be certified and configured for the specific frequency of the prefecture in which it is installed. Operating an inverter rated for 60 Hz in a 50 Hz zone (or vice versa) violates grid connection rules and can trigger protection faults.
summary.zh: 日本电网分为东部50 Hz（北海道、东北、关东等）和西部60 Hz（中部以西、近畿、中国、四国、九州）两个独立频率区域。分界线沿静冈县的富士川（富士River）走向——富士川以西为60 Hz，以东为50 Hz。长野县原则上供应60 Hz电力，但其中10个指定地区（包括饭山市、小诸市、佐久市、松本市、安昙野市、大町市等）供应50 Hz。并网光伏逆变器必须针对安装地区的具体频率进行认证和配置。在50 Hz区域使用60 Hz额定逆变器（或反之）违反并网规则，可能触发保护故障。
summary.zht: 日本電網分為東部50 Hz（北海道、東北、關東等）及西部60 Hz（中部以西、近畿、中國、四國、九州）兩個獨立頻率區域。分界線沿靜岡縣的富士川（富士River）走向——富士川以西為60 Hz，以東為50 Hz。長野縣原則上供應60 Hz電力，但其中10個指定地區（包括飯山市、小諸市、佐久市、松本市、安曇野市、大町市等）供應50 Hz。併網光伏逆變器必須針對安裝地區的具體頻率進行認證及配置。在50 Hz區域使用60 Hz額定逆變器（或反之）違反併網規則，可能觸發保護故障。

standards_or_laws: JEAC 9701-2024 (系統連系規程, 29th revision, September 2024) — frequency operating range and protection settings for grid-tied inverters; specific clause numbers require paid document access
Electricity Business Act (電気事業法) — general grid safety obligations

Grid Interconnection Code per each regional TSO (Tokyo Electric Power / Kansai Electric Power, etc.) — individual TSO rules are not publicly indexed; consult the regional TSO directly at interconnection application stage

summary.en: China operates a unified 50 Hz national grid. GB/T 19939 and NB/T 32004 specify inverter frequency operating range and trip thresholds, but there is no dual-frequency zone design requirement. Chinese inverters are therefore typically certified only for 50 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 中国采用统一的50 Hz全国电网。GB/T 19939和NB/T 32004规定了逆变器频率运行范围及跳闸阈值，但无双频区域设计要求。因此，国产逆变器通常仅针对50 Hz运行进行认证。
summary.zht: 中國採用統一的50 Hz全國電網。GB/T 19939及NB/T 32004規定了逆變器頻率運行範圍及跳閘閾值，但無雙頻區域設計要求。因此，國產逆變器通常僅針對50 Hz運行進行認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19939-2005 光伏系统并网技术要求
NB/T 32004-2018 光伏并网逆变器技术规范

gap.en: Chinese inverters designed only for 50 Hz cannot be used in Western Japan (60 Hz) without hardware redesign and re-certification. Even 50 Hz-capable units must verify protection trip thresholds match Japanese TSO requirements, which differ from Chinese grid codes. Dual-frequency support is a common rejection cause for Chinese PV inverters in Japan.
gap.zh: 仅为50 Hz设计的国产逆变器，若不经过硬件重新设计和重新认证，无法用于西日本（60 Hz）地区。即便是支持50 Hz的机型，也必须确认保护跳闸阈值符合日本各TSO要求，其规定与中国电网规范存在差异。双频支持是中国光伏逆变器进入日本市场的常见被拒原因。
gap.zht: 僅為50 Hz設計的國產逆變器，若不經過硬體重新設計及重新認證，無法用於西日本（60 Hz）地區。即便是支援50 Hz的機型，亦必須確認保護跳閘閾值符合日本各TSO要求，其規定與中國電網規範存在差異。雙頻支援是中國光伏逆變器進入日本市場的常見被拒原因。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — inverter must match installed-site grid frequency per grid connection approval process
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China is single-frequency (50 Hz) nationwide

source.publisher: Japan Electric Association (日本電気協会) — JEAC 9701-2024 store page (store.denki.or.jp); replaced jeac.or.jp which had connectivity issues. JEAC 9701-2024 is the current edition (29th revision, September 30, 2024).

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap exists. A Chinese PV inverter must confirm hardware support for 60 Hz (for Western Japan deployments) and verify frequency protection trip settings against local TSO interconnection rules (governed by JEAC 9701-2024) before grid connection approval. The 50Hz/60Hz boundary runs along the Fuji River in Shizuoka; Nagano is principally 60 Hz with 10 specific 50 Hz districts. This is a frequent technical barrier for Chinese units entering the Japanese market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距。用于西日本的中国光伏逆变器必须确认硬件支持60 Hz（50/60 Hz分界线为静冈县富士川；长野县原则上60 Hz，但有10个50 Hz指定地区），并在获得并网批准前，依据JEAC 9701-2024核实频率保护跳闸设定符合当地TSO互联规则。这是中国机组进入日本市场的常见技术壁垒。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距。用於西日本的中國光伏逆變器必須確認硬體支援60 Hz（50/60 Hz分界線為靜岡縣富士川；長野縣原則上60 Hz，但有10個50 Hz指定地區），並在獲得併網批准前，依據JEAC 9701-2024核實頻率保護跳閘設定符合當地TSO互聯規則。這是中國機組進入日本市場的常見技術壁壘。

requirement_topic.en: Anti-Islanding Detection and Voltage/Frequency Protection (単独運転検出)
requirement_topic.zh: 孤岛检测与电压/频率保护（単独運転検出）
requirement_topic.zht: 孤島檢測與電壓／頻率保護（単独運転検出）

summary.en: Japan requires grid-tied PV inverters to implement both passive and active anti-islanding detection methods, collectively termed 単独運転検出 (standalone-operation detection). Passive methods monitor voltage/frequency deviations; active methods (such as frequency shift or reactive power variation) must also be implemented to detect islanding when passive methods are insufficient. Voltage and frequency protection trip thresholds and clearing times are specified in JEAC 9701-2024 (29th revision, September 2024 — current edition) and must be set to values accepted by the regional grid operator (TSO). Fault Ride-Through (FRT) requirements apply to larger systems. Specific numeric thresholds are in the paid JEAC 9701-2024 document; consult the Japan Electric Association (store.denki.or.jp) or the regional TSO directly. These settings differ materially from Chinese grid codes.
summary.zh: 日本要求并网光伏逆变器同时实施被动和主动孤岛检测方法，统称为「単独運転検出」（孤岛运行检测）。被动方法监测电压/频率偏差；当被动方法不足以检测孤岛时，还必须实施主动方法（如频率偏移或无功功率变化）。电压和频率保护跳闸阈值及清除时间在JEAC 9701-2024（第29次修订，2024年9月——现行版本）中规定，必须设置为地区电网运营商（TSO）接受的数值。较大规模系统适用故障穿越（FRT）要求。具体数值阈值见付费文件JEAC 9701-2024，请向日本电气协会（store.denki.or.jp）或当地TSO直接咨询。这些设置与中国电网规范存在实质性差异。
summary.zht: 日本要求併網光伏逆變器同時實施被動和主動孤島檢測方法，統稱為「単独運転検出」（孤島運行檢測）。被動方法監測電壓／頻率偏差；當被動方法不足以檢測孤島時，還必須實施主動方法（如頻率偏移或無功功率變化）。電壓和頻率保護跳閘閾值及清除時間在JEAC 9701-2024（第29次修訂，2024年9月——現行版本）中規定，必須設置為地區電網運營商（TSO）接受的數值。較大規模系統適用故障穿越（FRT）要求。具體數值閾值見付費文件JEAC 9701-2024，請向日本電氣協會（store.denki.or.jp）或當地TSO直接諮詢。這些設置與中國電網規範存在實質性差異。

standards_or_laws: JEAC 9701-2024 (系統連系規程, 29th revision, September 2024) — anti-islanding, voltage/frequency protection, FRT requirements; clause numbers in paid document
Electricity Business Act (電気事業法) Art. 39 — technical standards for electrical equipment
METI Ministerial Ordinance on Technical Standards for Electrical Equipment (電気設備に関する技術基準を定める省令) — specific articles not publicly indexed; consult METI industrial safety portal
Regional TSO Grid Codes (e.g., TEPCO grid code, KEPCO grid code) — document titles and publication details vary by TSO; obtain directly from regional utility at interconnection application stage

summary.en: GB/T 19939 and NB/T 32004 require anti-islanding protection for grid-tied PV inverters in China, including both passive (under/over voltage, under/over frequency) and active detection methods. However, the specific trip thresholds, active detection algorithms, and FRT profiles mandated in Japan differ from Chinese standards. Chinese certification does not demonstrate compliance with Japanese TSO interconnection requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 19939和NB/T 32004要求中国并网光伏逆变器具备孤岛保护，包括被动（欠/过压、欠/过频）和主动检测方法。但日本规定的具体跳闸阈值、主动检测算法及FRT曲线与中国标准不同。中国认证不能证明符合日本TSO互联要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 19939及NB/T 32004要求中國併網光伏逆變器具備孤島保護，包括被動（欠／過壓、欠／過頻）及主動檢測方法。但日本規定的具體跳閘閾值、主動檢測算法及FRT曲線與中國標準不同。中國認證不能證明符合日本TSO互聯要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19939-2005 光伏系统并网技术要求
NB/T 32004-2018 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 19964-2024 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (FRT requirements for large-scale plants)

gap.en: Japan's active anti-islanding requirements (単独運転検出) specify particular detection methods and response times that Chinese grid codes do not fully replicate. Japanese TSO interconnection approval requires the inverter firmware and protection relay settings to be validated against local grid codes — Chinese type-approval alone is insufficient. FRT profiles and voltage/frequency trip windows also differ. This is a frequent technical rejection cause for Chinese PV inverters in Japan.
gap.zh: 日本的主动孤岛检测要求（単独運転検出）规定了特定的检测方法和响应时间，中国电网规范并未完全复制。日本TSO并网审批要求逆变器固件和保护继电器设置经过本地电网规范验证——仅凭中国型式认证不足。FRT曲线及电压/频率跳闸窗口也存在差异。这是中国光伏逆变器在日本被拒的常见技术原因。
gap.zht: 日本的主動孤島檢測要求（単独運転検出）規定了特定的檢測方法和響應時間，中國電網規範並未完全複製。日本TSO併網審批要求逆變器固件和保護繼電器設置經過本地電網規範驗證——僅憑中國型式認證不足。FRT曲線及電壓／頻率跳閘窗口也存在差異。這是中國光伏逆變器在日本被拒的常見技術原因。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required for grid connection approval from regional TSO under JEAC 9701 and Electricity Business Act
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 19939 and NB/T 32004, but specific requirements differ from Japan

source.publisher: Japan Electric Association (日本電気協会) — JEAC 9701-2024 store page; replaced stale 2011 METI HTML (HTTP 403). JEAC 9701-2024 is the governing code for anti-islanding and protection requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap exists. Chinese PV inverters must demonstrate compliance with Japanese active and passive anti-islanding detection requirements (単独運転検出) and have protection trip settings validated by the regional TSO before grid connection approval. Chinese type-approval certificates do not substitute for this validation. Importers and system integrators should engage directly with the regional TSO and reference JEAC 9701-2024 (current edition, September 2024).
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距。中国光伏逆变器必须证明符合日本主动和被动孤岛检测要求（単独運転検出），并在获得并网批准前由地区TSO验证保护跳闸设定。中国型式认证证书不能替代此验证。进口商和系统集成商应直接与地区TSO沟通，并参考JEAC 9701-2024（现行版本，2024年9月）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距。中國光伏逆變器必須證明符合日本主動和被動孤島檢測要求（単独運転検出），並在獲得併網批准前由地區TSO驗證保護跳閘設定。中國型式認證證書不能替代此驗證。進口商和系統整合商應直接與地區TSO溝通，並參考JEAC 9701-2024（現行版本，2024年9月）。
